items.title: Valid passport
items.details: At least 6 months validity beyond stay.

items.title: ESTA authorization
items.details: Apply online before travel (visa waiver eligible).

items.title: Return/onward ticket
items.details: Proof of onward travel and funds.

GB->US::TOURIST.processing: Immediate for most; up to 72 hours

items.title: Valid passport
items.details: At least 6 months validity beyond stay.

IN->GB::TOURIST.processing: Typically 3–6 weeks; priority options may exist

items.title: Valid passport
items.details: Generally 6+ months validity and 2 blank pages.

items.title: Visa route
items.details: e-Visa for some travellers; otherwise sticker visa via VAC (VFS). Check eligibility and official guidance.

items.title: Application & appointment
items.details: Fill online form; book biometrics/appointment if required.

items.title: Financial means
items.details: Recent bank statements/sponsor details per consular rules.

IN->TR::TOURIST.fees: Varies by route (e-Visa vs sticker); check official site
IN->TR::TOURIST.processing: Sticker visa typically 5–15 working days; e-Visa often immediate if eligible
